candidate_definition_hints.text: Learning to compose soft prompts for compositional zero-shot learning.

Compositional soft prompting (CSP), a parameter-efficient learning technique to improve the zero-shot compositionality of large-scale pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) without the overhead of fine-tuning the entire model.

candidate_glosses.text: Compositional soft prompting (CSP), a parameter-efficient learning technique to improve the zero-shot compositionality of large-scale pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) without the overhead of fine-tuning the entire model.
